name: Cybersecurity Policy for Critical Infrastructure Protection
description: Issued June 17, 2022, revised March 8, 2024. Designates Japan's critical infrastructure sectors and sets the policy framework under which sector regulators (FSA, MLIT, MHLW, etc.) issue their own sector-specific security guidelines.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/control/cyber.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Issued directly by a national government ministry/agency as an official notification/circular -- plausibly excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13(2) ("notifications, instructions, circulars, and other documents similar thereto issued by national or local government organs"), but this is a less clear-cut case than primary legislation (Art. 13(1)) and has not been legally verified. Treat as moderate-confidence permitted, not certain.

current_extraction.notes: Full English text acquired. Same GPKI-signed/encrypted PDF situation as the Common Standards document -- decrypted with qpdf, then pdftotext -layout succeeded.
